name: detour-subagents
description: Codebase-integrity subagents. First component: `plumber` — a topology/routing/wiring-integrity specialist that maps the dependency graph, enforces layer boundaries (surface → adapter → use case → domain → port → adapter), and prevents rat-tail topology. Ships with the `plumber-setup` skill that provisions a ratcheting flow-check (dependency-cruiser + madge) and a topology baseline so the agent reasons from evidence, not guesses.
